text.title: django-models Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: What does this FK point to?

branch.conclusion: on_delete=PROTECT (delete is an event, not silent cascade). Or SET_NULL if the relationship is genuinely optional.
on_delete=CASCADE. Reason must explicitly state "child row meaningless without parent" or equivalent.
on_delete=SET_NULL (the value becomes null, the row survives).
on_delete=PROTECT or DO_NOTHING. Reference data should not be deleted while in use.

branch.question: Is this combination (a) used on every list endpoint OR (b) on a hot path?

branch.conclusion: Add db_index=true (single field) OR Meta.indexes composite Index. Justify in reason ≥ 10 chars.
Do NOT add an index. Every index costs write amplification; only add when query traffic demands it.

text.example: fk=Invoice.customer -> Customer q-fk-target -> 'user-or-account' => conclusion r5: on_delete=PROTECT; reason="Preserve invoice history when Customer is soft-deleted."
